title: triglochin calcitrapa var. sessiliflora
intro: Triglochin calcitrapa var. sessiliflora, also known as the yellow form of the New Zealand strand lily, is a rare and unique plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that can help regulate gut health and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Triglochin calcitrapa var. sessiliflora can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules to utilize its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
